phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso del Campo Santo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so del KAM-poh SAN-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Dal lato nord, vicino al Duomo.
likely_response.pronunciation: DAHL LAH-toh NOHRD vee-CHEE-noh AHL doo-OH-moh
likely_response.translation_en: From the north side, near the Cathedral.

responses.english: From the north side, near the Cathedral.
responses.phonetic: DAHL LAH-toh NOHRD vee-CHEE-noh AHL doo-OH-moh
responses.local: Dal lato nord, vicino al Duomo.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora apre oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah AH-preh OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOS-tah eel bee-lyeh-TTOH, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, siete aperti oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh SYEH-teh ah-PEHR-tee OH-jee pehr fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si possono fare foto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, see POS-soh-noh FAH-reh FOH-toh, per fah-VOH-reh
